infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AeroMesh uses your location to attach GPS coordinates to barometric pressure readings and SOS events.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AeroMesh requires background location access to collect sensor readings and detect severe weather events even when the app is not in the foreground.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: AeroMesh requires background location access to collect sensor readings and detect severe weather events even when the app is not in the foreground.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: AeroMesh uses Bluetooth to form a peer-to-peer mesh network for relaying SOS signals in areas without cellular coverage.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: AeroMesh uses Bluetooth to advertise SOS signals to nearby devices in the mesh network.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: AeroMesh requires background location access to collect sensor readings and detect severe weather events even when the app is not in the foreground.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: AeroMesh uses Bluetooth to form a peer-to-peer mesh network for relaying SOS signals in areas without cellular coverage.
